reasoning.evidence: Content covers gsp-dba-maven-plugin setup (DDL generation, entity generation, schema management). No mention of BatchAction, DataReader, 都度起動, 常駐型, or Nablarchバッチ.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, jBatch, Batchlet, or Chunk processing.
No mention of RESTful, JAX-RS, @Produces, @Consumes, or JaxRsMethodBinder.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler.
No mention of Webアプリケーション, サーブレット, JSP, HttpRequest, or セッション管理.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, or MomMessagingAction.

No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader. Despite involving database configuration, this is a development tool (gsp-dba-maven-plugin) for DDL/entity generation, not the DB messaging processing pattern.
